hero.headline:
Your Backyard Paradise Starts
Right Here
hero.subheadline: From hot tubs and swim spas to pools, saunas, and game rooms — Elko Spas has helped Myrtle Beach families create the ultimate backyard for over 20 years. Visit our showroom, test before you buy, and let our in-house team handle every detail from delivery to lifetime service.

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Everything for Your Backyard<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Hot tubs, swim spas, pools, saunas, cold plunge tubs, and game rooms — plus the expert service team to keep it all running perfectly for years to come.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Swim Spas
cards.description: Premium hot tubs and versatile swim spas from top brands. Try them in our showroom, then let us deliver and install for a seamless experience.

cards.title: Pool Sales & Installation
cards.description: Above-ground and in-ground pools designed for your space and budget. From consultation to first splash, our team handles every step.

cards.title: Saunas & Cold Plunge
cards.description: Indoor and outdoor saunas plus cold plunge tubs for recovery and wellness. Experience the health benefits right in your own backyard.

cards.title: Game Rooms & Billiards
cards.description: Pool tables, shuffleboard, foosball, and accessories to build the ultimate entertainment space your family and friends will love.

cards.title: Water Care & Testing
cards.description: Free in-store water testing and a full line of chemicals and supplies to keep your pool or spa crystal clear all season long.

cards.title: Service & Repair
cards.description: Our in-house service division handles maintenance and repairs for hot tubs, spas, pools, and billiard equipment — fast and reliable.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Visit Our Showroom
steps.description: Walk through our Grand Strand showroom and see hot tubs, swim spas, pools, saunas, and game room products in person. Our team will help you find the perfect fit for your space and budget.

steps.title: We Handle the Details
steps.description: From financing and design consultation to professional delivery and installation, our experienced team takes care of everything so you don't have to worry about a thing.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy
steps.description: Your new hot tub, pool, or game room is ready to go. Plus, our in-house service team is always here for maintenance, repairs, and water care — for the lifetime of your purchase.

about.label: Why the Grand Strand Trusts Us
about.headline: Award-Winning Dealership, Hometown Service
about.description: For over 20 years, Elko Spas, Billiards & Pools has been the Grand Strand's go-to destination for backyard living. As an AQUA 100 Award winner with a 4.9-star Google rating from 700+ reviews, we've earned our reputation by standing behind every product we sell — from the showroom floor through the lifetime of your ownership. Our in-house delivery, installation, and service teams mean you'll never be passed off to a third party.

features.title: Full In-House Service Team
features.description: Delivery, installation, maintenance, and repair all handled by our own trained professionals — never outsourced, always accountable.

features.title: Try Before You Buy
features.description: Our comprehensive showroom lets you see, touch, and test products before purchasing — so you know exactly what you're getting.

features.title: Lifetime Ownership Support
features.description: Every purchase includes a starter kit, access to our service division, and our Preferred Customer Program for ongoing loyalty benefits.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Flexible Financing.
pricing.subtitle: We offer competitive pricing on every product, plus multiple financing options to fit your budget. Visit our showroom for a personalized quote.

guarantee.headline: Our "Customer First" Promise
guarantee.description: At Elko Spas, we stand behind every product we sell for the lifetime of your ownership. If something isn't right, our in-house service team will make it right — quickly and professionally. With 700+ five-star reviews and 20+ years in business, our reputation is our guarantee.

faqs.question: Can I try a hot tub or swim spa before buying?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our Myrtle Beach showroom has a wide selection of hot tubs, swim spas, saunas, and more on display. We encourage you to come in, see the products in person, and ask our team any questions before making a decision.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing options?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer multiple financing plans to fit a variety of budgets. Our team will walk you through the options during your visit so you can find a payment plan that works for you.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve for delivery and installation?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Grand Strand area including Myrtle Beach, North Myrtle Beach, Conway, Surfside Beach, and throughout Horry County, South Carolina. Contact us if you're unsure — we'll let you know.

faqs.question: Do you service products after the sale?
faqs.answer: Yes — and that's one of our biggest differentiators. We have a full in-house service division for hot tub, spa, pool, and billiard equipment maintenance and repair. You're never left on your own after purchase.

faqs.question: How long does delivery and installation take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary by product, but our local delivery and installation team works quickly to get you set up. We'll coordinate a convenient time and make sure everything is installed correctly and ready to enjoy.

testimonials.name: Anne K.
testimonials.text: The salt spa I bought from Elko is the best I ever owned. So easy to maintain. The team made the whole process from selection to installation completely seamless.

testimonials.name: Heather H.
testimonials.text: Just wanted to let you know how pleased we are with our pool. The staff were very hard working and professional from start to finish. We couldn't be happier with the result.

testimonials.name: Elaine B.
testimonials.text: I now sleep like a baby in my HotSpring tub from Elko Spas! The showroom experience was wonderful and the delivery team was top-notch. Highly recommend to everyone.

contact.subtitle: Visit our Myrtle Beach showroom or call us today. No pressure — just honest advice from a team that's been helping Grand Strand families relax for over 20 years.
